sky.mix.uk.title: Hull KR Renaissance
sky.mix.uk.description: A Little Respect: Lifelong Robins fan Craig Eskrett, who suffers with MND, is just the boost Hull KR need in their Challenge Cup semi-final preparations. Contains strong language. (3 of 7)

sky.mix.uk.title: Hull KR Renaissance
sky.mix.uk.description: Memories Are Better Than Dreams: On the verge of ending 40 trophyless years, Hull KR reach Wembley and are set to compete for the game's oldest prize. Contains strong language. (4 of 7)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Ipswich/Man Utd 1994
sky.mix.uk.description: Ipswich: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Ipswich Town, the 3-2 win over Manchester United in September 1994.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:M City/L'Pool 15
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a Premier League classic, as Man City face Liverpool back in November 2015. City needed a win to go back top of the table, while Liverpool were adapting to life under Jurgen Klopp.

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Golf Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: The concluding day of the PGA Tour's Genesis Invitational at the Riviera Country Club. Last year, Ryder Cup star Ludvig Åberg claimed victory. (22.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Spa. With eyes on the weather, Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri lock out the front, while Charles Leclerc starts P3. Lewis Hamilton bids to fight through the field. (27.07)

sky.mix.uk.title: Hungarian F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at the Hungaroring. As Charles Leclerc goes up against the McLarens from pole, both Max Verstappen and Lewis Hamilton face tough recovery drives from further back. (03.08)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Aston Villa v N. Forest
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Aston Villa play Nottingham Forest in a thrilling draw in September 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Cardiff v Bristol City
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Cardiff City face Bristol City in a Severnside derby in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was Neil Warnock's first game at Cardiff.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Burton v Birmingham
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Burton Albion face Birmingham City in 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was the sides' first competitive meeting.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17:Birmingham v Aston Villa
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, local rivals Birmingham City and Aston Villa clash in the Sky Bet Championship at St Andrew's in October 2016.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a rematch of the 2023 Madrid Open final, world number one Iga Swiatek and defending champion Aryna Sabalenka meet again to determine this year's women's singles champion.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Andre Agassi and Pete Sampras met in the 2001 Indian Wells final - one of 34 career meetings. Agassi eyed a second consecutive win over Sampras in their first meeting in over a year.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Wolves v Derby County
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Wolves host Derby County at Molineux in a five-goal thriller back in a Bonfire Night sizzler in 2016.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: N. Forest v Newcastle
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest take on Newcastle United at the City Ground in a game that saw two red cards and two penalties.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Aston Villa
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Leeds United face Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship, with the sides meeting in the league for the first time since 2004.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 16/17: Huddersfield v Leeds
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, a West Yorkshire derby as Huddersfield Town play Leeds United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Belfast
sky.mix.uk.description: The Premier League roadshow arrives in Belfast as Northern Irishman Josh Rock headlines the quarter-final ties against fellow newcomer Gian van Veen, while MVG battles Gerwyn Price.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In the 1996 Indian Wells final, Steffi Graf - having made her competitive return after a four-month injury layoff - would compete with Spain's Conchita Martinez for the title.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In a battle of generations, two of the all-time greats Roger Federer and Andre Agassi fought for the year-end championship in 2003. Federer was aiming for his first title on American soil.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Rio
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the 2026 Rio Open on the ATP Tour. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:M City/L'Pool 13
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a Premier League classic, as Man City face Liverpool back in 2013. City needed three points to close the gap at the top to Man Utd, while the Reds were chasing a top four spot.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Man U/L'Pool '95
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Man United host Liverpool in October 1995, as Eric Cantona returned from his lengthy suspension in a thrilling 2-2 draw.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '97
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United at Anfield in 1997, in a match that had a happy outcome for the Red Devils.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:L'Pool/Man U '01
sky.mix.uk.description: A look back at some classic matches in the Premier League. Here, Liverpool meet Manchester United in 2001, as a Michael Owen brace guided the home side to victory.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Doha
sky.mix.uk.description: Standing between Carlos Alcaraz, in the midst of an 11-game winning run, and a maiden Qatar Open title is the resurgent Arthur Fils - playing in his first final since 2024. (21.02)

tnt4.description: Action from the final stage of the Giro di Sardegna, as the peloton journey 177km from Nuoro to a finish in Olbia.

tnt4.title: TNT Sports Reload
tnt4.description: The best bits from TNT Sports over the last week, including exclusive interviews, top action, and more.

tnt4.title: IBSF World Cup 2025/26
tnt4.description: A review of the 2025/26 International Bobsleigh and Skeleton Federation World Cup in Altenberg, Germany. This was the last major World Cup stop before Milano Cortina 2026.

tnt4.title: Live: Cross Country Skiing WC
tnt4.description: Action from the women's skiathlon at the FIS Cross Country Skiing World Cup in Falun, Sweden.

tnt4.title: Training Day
tnt4.description: Fara Williams and Anita Asante spend the day at Tottenham Hotspur Women, where they meet the squad and go head-to-head in shooting practice.

tnt4.title: UCL: Bayer Leverkusen v Olympiacos
tnt4.description: Bayer Leverkusen look to seal a place in the UEFA Champions League round of 16, as they take a two-goal advantage into this play-off second leg tie against Olympiacos.

tnt4.title: UCL: Atletico Madrid v Club Brugge
tnt4.description: Action from Riyadh Air Metropolitano, where the tie is level after a six-goal first-leg thriller. Can Club Brugge spring an upset, or will Atletico Madrid clinch a last-16 spot?

tnt4.title: UCL: Inter v Bodo/Glimt
tnt4.description: Inter look to overturn a two-goal deficit as they host Bodo/Glimt in this play-off second leg. Can the visitors keep their fairytale run alive, or will the Serie A leaders prevail?

tnt4.title: UCL: Paris Saint-Germain v Monaco
tnt4.description: After recording a thrilling 3-2 win in the first leg, reigning champions Paris Saint-Germain look to hold onto their lead in this play-off second leg against Sebastien Pocognoli's Monaco.

tnt4.title: UCL: Atalanta v Dortmund
tnt4.description: Action from the UEFA Champions League play-off second leg between Atalanta and Borussia Dortmund at Signal Iduna Park. The visitors hold a two-goal advantage from the first leg.

tnt4.title: UCL: Juventus v Galatasaray
tnt4.description: Action from the Allianz Stadium as Juventus look to overturn a three-goal deficit against Turkish champions Galatasaray in this play-off second-leg tie.

tnt4.title: UCL: Real Madrid v Benfica
tnt4.description: Jose Mourinho returns to the Estadio Bernabeu as his Benfica side face an uphill task, needing to fight back from a goal down against 15-time winners Real Madrid.

tnt4.title: UEL: Stuttgart v Celtic
tnt4.description: Three goals adrift after the first leg, Martin O'Neill's Celtic look to mount a monumental fightback as they take on Bundesliga high-flyers Stuttgart at the MHPArena.

tnt4.title: UEL: Nottm Forest v Fenerbahce
tnt4.description: Nottingham Forest look to seal their place in the round of 16 as they host Fenerbahce at the City Ground, holding a commanding three-goal lead from the first leg.

tnt4.title: UCoL: Crystal Palace v Zrinjski
tnt4.description: Crystal Palace look to book a spot in the UEFA Conference League round of 16 as they host Bosnia and Herzegovina's Zrinjski Mostar at Selhurst Park.

tnt4.title: Alpine Skiing World Cup - Women's
tnt4.description: Action from day two of the women's super-G at the FIS Alpine Skiing World Cup in Soldeu, Andorra.

tnt4.title: Alpine Skiing World Cup - Men's
tnt4.description: Action from the men's super-G at the FIS Alpine Skiing World Cup in Garmisch-Partenkirchen, Germany. Can anyone challenge leader Marco Odermatt?

tnt4.title: Ski Jumping World Cup
tnt4.description: Action from day two of the men's HS235 at the FIS Ski Jumping World Cup in Bad Mitterndorf, Austria.

tnt4.title: Ski Jumping World Cup
tnt4.description: Action from day two of the women's HS90 at the FIS Ski Jumping World Cup in Hinzenbach, Austria.

Blaze.uk.description: Action Packed Pawn: A ceramic owl made by Pablo Picasso sends Rick cock-a-hoot. Meanwhile, Beatlemania takes over the shop as a Yellow Submarine poster arrives on the counter.

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars
Blaze.uk.description: Jurassic Pawn: Chum gets into the teen spirit when a piece of Kurt Cobain memorabilia finds its way into the shop. Rick takes a swing at a National League Championship ring.

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars
Blaze.uk.description: Rick Vs. The Globe Of Death: Rick and Chum get a genius package containing letters signed by Albert Einstein. Chum and Corey marvel at replicas of Thor's helmet and hammer.

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: Trading Places: When an injury sidelines Allen at the shop, Ton goes rogue at auction, ignoring his partner's advice and making risky purchases. (S4, ep 6)

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: Flying Ton, Creeping Allen: When a group of thugs try to bully Ton and Allen, the guys fight back, leading to a violent showdown and the discovery of a rare Bornean blowgun. (S4, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: Whip it Good: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks and is out for revenge. (S4, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: Machine Gun Ton: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind. (S4, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Lego My Locker: Darrell must deal with Kimber's eyes on a competitor, Dusty unpacks what could be the ultimate assistant and Rene pulls off one of his greatest profits. (S14, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Reign or Shine: King Darrell strives to defend his throne, but Rene and Casey signal their intentions to undermine his plans. Meanwhile, Kenny gets bowled over by his locker. (S14, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: The King of Montebowl-o: Barry turns up to auction armed with a present for a certain hustler. Meanwhile, Brandi and Bozek get a firm grip on a smaller unit. (S14, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Here Comes the Calvin-ry!: Lisa dons her cowboy gear and brings her money sock along, while Rene sinks his teeth into an unassuming unit and Brandi goes on a scavenger hunt. (S14, ep 11)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Zip Tie Lies: Rene and Casey roll the dice on some sealed totes in San Bernardino, while Kenny stumbles over some odd-looking car parts and Lisa shields herself from disaster. (S14, ep 12)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Children of the Cornbread: Ivy does his utmost to intimidate the other buyers in Lancaster, while Brandi gives in to Bozek and Dusty goes up against the King to prove a point. (S14, ep 13)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Proxy Moxie: Barry uses a little-known tactic to snatch up a locker and it ties him up in knots. Meanwhile, Brandi shops in the bargain basement and Ivy lands a sizeable unit. (S14, ep 14)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Two for the Price of Dust: The big guns come out in Riverside, but Rene isn't having any of it. Darrell pushes his luck with a smaller locker and makes a neat profit. (S14, ep 15)

Blaze.uk.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
Blaze.uk.description: Hairy Situation: While a trip abroad brings new discoveries, the team is thrilled to find new evidence linking Lot Five and the Money Pit. (S11, ep 24)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Death Coast
Blaze.uk.description: Graveyard of Scatarie: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for The Feversham's lost fortune. Battling currents, they uncover artifacts that may lead to treasure. (S1, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: Secrets Of The Lost Liners
Blaze.uk.description: America: Once the flagship in the United States Lines, the SS America served her owners for 55 years until she was unceremoniously left abandoned in the Canary Islands. (6 of 6)

Blaze.uk.title: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
Blaze.uk.description: Two hikers take refuge from a storm in a haunted hut in Scotland and a California man's canine companion calls out from the other side. (S8, ep 9)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Jonathan has lost his balloon, so Paddington tries to get him a new one but accidentally ends up flying all over London. How will he get down? (VS) (S1 Ep36)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Holly accidentally breaks her mum's special new teapot. Can Ben help her repair it? (VS) (S1 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Mixmups
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Mixmups end up in the wrong adventure and don't know what to do. Can they find another way to enjoy the adventure they've ended up in? (S1 Ep29)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Heroic Hounds
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Travel across the UK with the PAW Patrol, meeting real-life heroic hounds - from medical detection pups to mountain rescue dogs. These pups make a real difference to peoples' lives! (S1 Ep6/10)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Peppa volunteers Mummy Pig to do a parachute jump to raise money for the school roof repairs. (S5 Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Gerald Giraffe is new to the playgroup and he's trying to make friends, but he finds being so tall makes playing hide and seek quite a challenge! (S5 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: King Thistle is perplexed when his magic bird-spotting book cannot identify a new creature who makes a nest in the castle. (S1 Ep49)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Nia has volunteered for a big day of deliveries and is determined to make the perfect plan to get it done in Nia's Perfect Plan.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Fireman Sam
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When James becomes Malcolm's deputy for the day, they end up with a real case to solve: The Case of the Missing Sandwiches. (S12 Ep12)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Tim Rex in Space
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Tim tries to rid the house of a troublesome spider. (S1 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Mr Potato visits the school to talk about fruit and vegetables. But which team will win his quiz? (S6 Ep31)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Peppa Pig
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Peppa and George join Granny Pig and her friends to play at being Vikings. (S6 Ep32)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Pip and Posy
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Pip gets carried away tidying up Posy's house and making it more like his. Posy gets frustrated as he won't listen about how she wants her own house to be. (S2 Ep49)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Woohoos!
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Scotty is afraid of thunder and his friends want to help him. They work out that you can tell how close or far away a storm is by counting the time between lightning and thunder. (S1 Ep49)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Adventures of Paddington
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Paddington, Jonathan, and Judy try to find champion hide-and-seeker Mrs Bird. (S1 Ep41)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: PAW Patrol
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Animation. Sweetie hijacks the cloaked Air Patroller and steals the royal throne of Barkingburg. (S4 Ep 49)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Animal Care Club
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The Cadets head to West Midlands Safari Park, where they get up close to feed a rhino, make yummy ice treats to keep the elephants cool, and lend a hand grooming some cheeky goats. (S2 Ep6)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Creature Cases
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A bird neighbourhood is rattled by a mysterious invader, who is pushing eggs out of nests, and replacing them with her own! (S1 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Patrick Star Show
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Patrick and SpongeBob go back in time to watch Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy when they were new. (S1 Ep20)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Entertainment News on 5
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Singer Paige prepares for one of her most important gigs yet, hoping to impress with her recently launched tribute to pop diva Lady Gaga. (S14 Ep63)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Malta: The Jewel of the Med
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: We venture inside one of the country's grandest stately homes, reveal the remarkable survival story of Malta's beautiful church of Mosta, and visit the 'little sister' island of Gozo. (Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Malta: The Jewel of the Med
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A mysterious neolithic site, turtles, and the Grand Prix feature in this episode, which also includes a candle festival and a trip to Malta's beautiful little sister island Gozo. (Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Jane rides a sumptuous steam train from the peak of the Austro-Hungarian Empire, boards a luxury river ship to Bratislava, and visits Dracula's castle. (S5 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Jane cruises the Adriatic from historic Dubrovnik, via Venice, to the spectacular Split and the beautiful bay of Boka. (S6 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Inside the Tower of London
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: The fortress prepares to make important changes to mark the new King's reign. Preparations are also made for the installation of the new Constable of the Tower. (S5 Ep7)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Inside the Tower of London
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Behind the walls for another extraordinary year. It's March 2023 and the Tower prepares for one the most important events in its 1000-year history - the crowning of a new monarch. (S6 Ep1)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Great Stink of 1858
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Shocking documentary revealing how gallons of raw sewage dumped in the river Thames produced a noxious cesspool of filth with a stench that overwhelmed London in 1858 during a summer heatwave.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News Weekend
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Celebrity Puzzling
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Carol Vorderman and Sally Lindsay lead celebrity teams in Celebrity Puzzling. Jeremy Vine hosts as Ore Oduba and Gareth Malone join the fun. Who will conquer tonight's mental marathon? S1 Ep1

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Romance Scams: Don't Get Caught Out
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Alexis Conran investigates the rising world of romance scams, revealing how fraudsters use charm, lies and emotional manipulation to exploit people searching for love.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: 22 Kids & Counting
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: 16-year-old Max's ambition is to work on vast engineering projects but first he must overcome a formidable obstacle. Meanwhile Ellie questions her relationship with boyfriend Steven. (S8 Ep4)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Rich House, Poor House
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: An edition that shines a light on Britain's big wealth divide as muti-millionaire plumbing entrepreneurs swap lives with another couple in the trades who lead a very different life. (S12 Ep3)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Ian Huntley & The Soham Murder Trials
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A new perspective on the Soham murders, using transcripts, testimony and reconstruction to unravel the trial of Ian Huntley, accused of murdering two girls, and his girlfriend Maxine.

E4Extra.uk.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
E4Extra.uk.description: Three couples put their hosting skills to the test on Jersey, in a week featuring wedding talk, a chinchilla dinner guest and cocktails from a fake cow...

E4Extra.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

E4Extra.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Extra.uk.description: Zayna Flaming Grill (Part 1/2): Gordon makes the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant in Redondo Beach owned by Faye and her niece Brenda. (S7 Ep6)

E4Extra.uk.title: The Big Fat Quiz of Telly
E4Extra.uk.description: Who shot Mr Burns? What are The Chasers' nicknames? And what's 'The Peppa Effect'? Harry Hill, Judi Love, Tom Allen, Joanne McNally, Sam Campbell and Susan Wokoma take Jimmy Carr's TV test.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained
Film4.uk.description: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

Film4.uk.title: The Kid Detective
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Dark Adam Brody comedy. Abe was a childhood detecting prodigy but is now a failing PI. But when a local boy is killed Abe gets the case. Things are looking up (for Abe, not the boy).

Film4.uk.title: Thief
Film4.uk.description: (1971) Crime thriller starring Richard Crenna. A recently paroled thief must do one last job to pay off old debts. But can he get away with it and build a life with his new girlfriend?

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Patton
Film4.uk.description: (1970) Multi-Oscar-winning, fact-based, Second World War drama starring George C Scott, who gives a vivid portrait of the famously straight-talking US commander General George Patton.

Film4.uk.title: Ride Lonesome
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

Film4.uk.title: Twelve O'Clock High
Film4.uk.description: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

Film4.uk.title: Mrs Doubtfire
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Comedy starring Robin Williams and Sally Field. A struggling actor dresses as a woman to get his estranged wife to hire him as a housekeeper, so he can spend more time with his kids.

Film4.uk.title: The Creator
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Sci-fi extravaganza starring John David Washington. An undercover operative must destroy a superweapon in a war against AI. But the superweapon looks like a little girl.

Film4.uk.title: The Witch: Part 2 - The Other One
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Park Hoon-jung's blood-soaked sci-fi horror sequel starring Shin Si-ah as a super-powered lab experiment let loose on the world to terminate with extreme prejudice and some gusto.

Film4.uk.title: Lola
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Lo-fi sci-fi. In 1940, two sisters invent a contraption that intercepts future broadcasts. But it inadvertently creates an alternate timeline in which the Nazis win the war. Oops.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Call of the Wild
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Touching adventure with Harrison Ford, based on Jack London's classic novel. A big, friendly hound finds himself unwittingly travelling across late 19th-century North America.

Film4.uk.title: Monkey Business
Film4.uk.description: (1952) Screwball comedy starring Cary Grant as a scientist who drinks the elixir of youth and starts acting the fool, as does his strait-laced wife (Ginger Rogers).

Film4.uk.title: Secret Headquarters
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Family comedy with Michael Peña. A young lad discovers that his slacker dad is a superhero. And before he's got used to the idea, he must foil a villain's plot to bring his dad down.

Film4.uk.title: Taxi
Film4.uk.description: (2004) All-action thriller. Queen Latifah stars as the driver of the fastest taxi in New York, who teams up with an inept cop (Jimmy Fallon) to catch a team of female bank-robbers.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

Film4.uk.title: Dante's Peak
Film4.uk.description: (1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.

Film4.uk.title: The Equalizer
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

Film4.uk.title: The Frighteners
Film4.uk.description: (1996) Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud?

Film4.uk.title: Boss Level
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Major and the Minor
Film4.uk.description: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

Film4.uk.title: First Knight
Film4.uk.description: (1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?

Film4.uk.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

Film4.uk.title: Deja Vu
Film4.uk.description: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

Film4.uk.title: Ambulance
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

SkyMix.uk.description: Men in masks carry out a Halloween raid, while a war veteran's new home becomes a crime scene and a greedy burglar gets his comeuppance at a hardware store. (S6, ep 5)

SkyMix.uk.title: Caught Red Handed

SkyMix.uk.title: Caught Red Handed

SkyMix.uk.title: Africa's Wild Horizons

SkyMix.uk.title: Kalahari: Land Of Secret Alliances

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Life on the Edge
UAndW.uk.description: The Dark Side of Pleasure: Louis explores how America has managed to take our darkest desires, commodify them and turn them into a saleable product. S1 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: Katie Piper: Locked Up In Louisiana
UAndW.uk.description: Katie meets Kimberly, who is accused of killing a woman she was dating, and learns that Kimberly's life derailed after she got into a car accident and became addicted to opioids. S1 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: The Most Hated Family in America
UAndW.uk.description: Wry observer of oddballs Louis Theroux turns his attention to the Phelps clan who picket America, promoting an intolerance of gay life.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Under the Knife
UAndW.uk.description: Louis meets an eccentric cosmetic surgeon as he investigates image obsession in California - the birthplace of plastic surgery. Will he be tempted to go under the knife?

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Michael McIntyre hosts the Saturday-night game show, joined by Richard E Grant, Saffron Barker, David Haye, Anneka Rice, Danny Jones, Jo Brand and Melvin Odoom. S2 Ep13

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: MasterChef Australia
UAndW.uk.description: It's Elimination Day and the contestants have a two-round challenge that includes a taste test. The winners receive a colour that they must use as inspiration for their dish. S15 Ep35

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: Paramedics are called to a 67-year-old with a lung condition who can't breathe. Plus, crews help a 53-year-old who's had several seizures. S13 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point
UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine. S10 Ep149

UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine. S10 Ep150

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Hessle: The DIY SOS team and hundreds of kind volunteers step up to help the recently widowed and wheelchair-bound Darren and his three sons. S30 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Torquay: In Torquay, the team help multiple sclerosis sufferer Stuart, his daughter Lauren and his mother Lin, who cares for Stuart despite being completely blind. S30 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Plymouth: In Plymouth, the team help the Morfey family. Two of the boys have cerebral palsy, and the family has been struggling to make their multi-level home disabled-friendly. S30 Ep3

UAndW.uk.description: Another renovation challenge for Drew and Jonathan Scott. Here they help brothers Scott and Trevor, who are looking for an all-in-one investment and living solution. S5 Ep18

UAndW.uk.title: My Dream Home
UAndW.uk.description: Property renovation series hosted by Drew and Jonathan Scott. A couple searches for their dream home, but first must agree on the right location. S5 Ep19

UAndW.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndW.uk.description: Hessle: The DIY SOS team and hundreds of kind volunteers step up to help the recently widowed and wheelchair-bound Darren and his three sons. S30 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
UAndW.uk.description: Crumble's Big Adventure: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, who's been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight. S3 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: An asthmatic deteriorates rapidly in the ambulance, and the crews are called to a 30-year-old car that's been driven into a wall by a 90-year-old driver. S10 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: Reality series following the work of Yorkshire Hazardous Area Response Team. The team try to seal a major chemical spill and help a teenager who fell down a chimney. S1 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: Reality series following Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. In this edition the team race to save a man who has been shot outside a mosque. S1 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Ambulance Australia
UAndW.uk.description: Mosh and Kren tend to a 35-week pregnant woman with severe bleeding. Meanwhile, Paramedics rush to Sydney airport following a bomb threat. S2 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux America's...
UAndW.uk.description: ...Most Hated Family in Crisis. Following up on his 2007 documentary, The Most Hated Family in America, Louis Theroux returns to Topeka, Kansas, for a week-long visit with the Westboro Baptist Church.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux's LA Stories: Among The Sex Offenders
UAndW.uk.description: In his final LA Story, Louis Theroux spends time in the twilight world of the city's paroled sex offenders, who live under force of tough regulations.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Dermot O'Leary, Penny Lancaster, Krishnan Guru-Murthy, Judi Love, Michael Vaughan, Craig Revel Horwood and Nikki Fox are on hand to assist the contestants hoping to win big. S2 Ep14

UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Hide and Seek: Rachel takes up her duties as an Inspector by organising a joint raid with CID on a crack den, where a frightened young girl is found boarded up in the fireplace. S27 Ep70

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: First Strike: Rachel is frustrated when two brothers offer different versions of the stabbing of a drug dealer. Will gets a chance to impress Neil, who makes him an interesting offer. S27 Ep71

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Hold Me Tight: Part 1: A hysterical mother reports her eight-year-old daughter missing, but when a body is discovered the only two suspects are released for lack of evidence. S27 Ep72

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Hold Me Tight: Part 2: Evidence reveals Mason Kemble was present at his classmate's murder and Neil arrests him. Grace becomes frustrated as she struggles to get the truth out of the boy. S27 Ep73

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: The Rookie: Will joins the CID team as a trainee, and tackles the case of a developer who goes missing after threats from anti-capitalist protesters and a protection racketeer. S27 Ep74

UAndW.uk.description: A car being pursued by police crashes and HART are called to treat a passenger trapped in her seat with serious injuries. Meanwhile, floodwaters swamp a Yorkshire town. S4 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: A horse rider is hit by a car on a country road, leaving both her and her horse with serious injuries. Plus, the centre of Leeds is locked down after a suspicious package is found. S4 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: The HART paramedics race to rescue the passenger of a car involved in a high speed crash, and the medics face crossing a fast-flowing river to help a man who's gone missing from home. S4 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: Nurses on the Ward
UAndW.uk.description: Caroline treats an unvaccinated Covid patient who's been in a coma for weeks. Matron Hazera assesses a deep tissue injury and Kat cares for a man in pain after kidney stone surgery. S1 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: Nurses on the Ward
UAndW.uk.description: Matron Hazera is called to save a person standing on the edge of a building, while nurse Kat treats a woman with suspected ovarian cancer. S1 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: The second series of the hilarious comedy sketch show begins. Characters this time include Lauren, Derek Faye, who may find someone impertinent, and Nan. S2 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: Catherine Tate's back with another batch of brilliantly observed characters, including an unorthodox dog trainer whose methods produce quite frankly hair-raising results. S2 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: Award-winning comedy sketch series with characters played by the versatile actress. Tactful wigmakers to the stars Ivan and Trudy are introduced. Una Stubbs guest stars. S2 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Ambulance Australia
UAndW.uk.description: It's Australia Day and the paramedics are swamped with alcohol-related calls, including one about a man found passed out in his car in the middle of the road. S2 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Transgender Kids
UAndW.uk.description: Documentary following Louis Theroux as he travels to San Francisco where a group of pioneering medical professionals are helping children with gender dysphoria. Ep22

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Altered...
UAndW.uk.description: ...States: Love Without Limits. Louis travels to Portland, Oregon, and discovers a whole spectrum of non-traditional family set-ups: some that work and some that have been pushed to breaking point.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: The players face a colossal spinning wheel as they attempt to win a fortune with some help from Peter Andre, Rob Beckett and Patricia Bright. S2 Ep15

UAndW.uk.description: Luck Be a Lady Tonight: Popular domestic sitcom. Susan suggests Roger should make Abi jealous, and Ben despairs. S5 Ep5

UAndW.uk.description: First Past the Post: Family fun with the eccentric Harper family, starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker. With a burst of civic pride, Susan decides to run for the council. S5 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: My Will Be Done: Zoe Wanamaker is one half of a quirky couple in the popular sitcom. Ben thinks about his will and Nick takes a job at a funeral director's. S5 Ep7

UAndW.uk.description: My Fair Charlady: Here's something most Mums dream about in the popular sitcom. Susan employs a cleaner, who turns out to be such a treasure that she takes over the cooking as well. S5 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Sunny, Bertie & Edith: Bouncy Golden Retriever puppy Bertie has a dislocated hip, Tibetan terrier Sunny is almost immobile, and Springer Spaniel Edith has a bulging spinal disc. S7 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Domino, Diamond, Willow & Luigi: Pop superstar Will Young brings in two of his rescue dogs, Domino and Diamond, while supermodel Yasmin Le Bon's French Bulldog Willow collapses at home. S7 Ep11

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Monty, Odin & Maya: Caucasian Shepherd Odin has Wobbler Syndrome, Toy Poodle Monty needs a total hip replacement, and Malamute Husky Cross Maya needs to get back on her four feet again. S8 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Poppy, Keira & Bella: In this puppy special, Noel treats Border Terrier Kiera, and we look back at Springer Spaniel Poppy, who had one of the worst leg deformities Noel had ever seen. S8 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Pretzel, Bran & Wobble: In this rescue special, we meet abandoned kitten Pretzel with severely twisted back legs, and look back at Wobble the Whippet and three-legged German Shepherd Bran. S8 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital. S10 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer. S10 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: A girl has an operation to have squints in both eyes realigned, a man has his infected gall bladder removed and an ex-police officer is having a grommet inserted in her ear. S2 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: A woman has an operation to repair the hernia she suffered while giving birth and a four-year-old's ear blockage is so bad he needs a general anaesthetic to it sucked out. S2 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
UAndW.uk.description: Every Student Counts: Student midwives Ruby and Grace are in the second year of their studies and are now learning on the job. Summah and her friend Lilli enjoy cocktails and a takeaway. S1 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Stacey Dooley: Face to Face with Armageddon
UAndW.uk.description: The journalist meets Americans prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Extreme Love Autism
UAndW.uk.description: Louis Theroux explores relationships complicated by medical conditions. Here, he visits one of America's best schools for autism.

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Sunny, Bertie & Edith: Bouncy Golden Retriever puppy Bertie has a dislocated hip, Tibetan terrier Sunny is almost immobile, and Springer Spaniel Edith has a bulging spinal disc. S7 Ep10

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Domino, Diamond, Willow & Luigi: Pop superstar Will Young brings in two of his rescue dogs, Domino and Diamond, while supermodel Yasmin Le Bon's French Bulldog Willow collapses at home. S7 Ep11

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Monty, Odin & Maya: Caucasian Shepherd Odin has Wobbler Syndrome, Toy Poodle Monty needs a total hip replacement, and Malamute Husky Cross Maya needs to get back on her four feet again. S8 Ep1

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Poppy, Keira & Bella: In this puppy special, Noel treats Border Terrier Kiera, and we look back at Springer Spaniel Poppy, who had one of the worst leg deformities Noel had ever seen. S8 Ep2

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Pretzel, Bran & Wobble: In this rescue special, we meet abandoned kitten Pretzel with severely twisted back legs, and look back at Wobble the Whippet and three-legged German Shepherd Bran. S8 Ep3

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital. S10 Ep5

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer. S10 Ep6

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: A girl has an operation to have squints in both eyes realigned, a man has his infected gall bladder removed and an ex-police officer is having a grommet inserted in her ear. S2 Ep1

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: A woman has an operation to repair the hernia she suffered while giving birth and a four-year-old's ear blockage is so bad he needs a general anaesthetic to it sucked out. S2 Ep2

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Every Student Counts: Student midwives Ruby and Grace are in the second year of their studies and are now learning on the job. Summah and her friend Lilli enjoy cocktails and a takeaway. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Buses/Ladyline/Norton Jubilee: Derek's got his work cut out collecting a huge haul that includes two Bentleys, a Daimler and a traditional Bowtop caravan. S10 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Merc/Unicycle/Sinclair C5/Golf/AWO: Dave has to extricate a VW Golf from a garden that has grown up around it. S10 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Experiments of War: Exploring a crumbling dam hidden in the Welsh valleys, a quaint outpost on a paradise island, and a mastery of ancient engineering that brought life to the planes of Mexico. S9 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Alien Contact: Exploring a complex in Georgia pointing into deep space that almost discovered a signal from aliens. S9 Ep10

UAndYesterday.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Occupied Territories: The sabotaging efforts of Peugeot in Nazi-occupied France, where the bosses and workers cooperated with the Resistance to hinder the Nazis' use of military vehicles. S1 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: BMW Z4 Batmobile/Ford Army Jeep: Derek is picking up two expertly crafted Batmobile replicas in the home counties and Dave can't control his enthusiasm for a Ford US wartime jeep. S6 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Burlington Arrow/Vauxhall Cresta: Paul is picking up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, inspired by American design, the car changed the face of British motoring. S6 Ep9

UAndYesterday.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterday.uk.description: US Ships: The story of America's 'Liberty Ships', which were produced in incredible numbers and became known as the Model T Fords of the ocean. S1 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterday.uk.description: The Story of the Machine Gun: Hiram Maxim developed the world's first fully automatic machine gun, but it weighed a whopping 136 lbs - until British company Vickers adapted the design. S3 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Antiques Roadshow
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Trelissick 2: Fiona Bruce presents from Trelissick House and gardens in Cornwall, with unusual finds ranging from an ejector seat from a Vulcan bomber to a miniature sewing kit. S40 Ep20

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Antiques Roadshow
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Helmingham Hall 3: The team return to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk, where items include a sapphire ring and a sketch by founder of the Boy Scouts and Girl Guides Robert Baden-Powell. S40 Ep21

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: E-type/LC3 Truck/Morris 8/Mini Van: Derek is off to Bridlington to pick-up a trio of classics: a Morris 8 tourer, a Mini Van and a 1940s Morris LC3 truck. S10 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Interceptor/Opel GT/Hot Rod: Derek heads off to Blackpool to pick up a couple of unusual vehicles - a red 1970 Opel GT and a 1956 Ford Hot Rod pickup. S10 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Rising to the Occasion: Saucy wartime shenanigans as Michelle comes up with an audacious escape plan with cylinders of helium disguised as prize-winning marrows. S6 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
UAndYesterday.uk.description: A Quiet Honeymoon: Don't mention the war! It's David Croft's WWII sitcom. Newlyweds Fanny and Leclerc are sent to jail by the Germans. Rene is in no hurry to rescue them. S7 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.description: E-type/LC3 Truck/Morris 8/Mini Van: Derek is off to Bridlington to pick-up a trio of classics: a Morris 8 tourer, a Mini Van and a 1940s Morris LC3 truck. S10 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Interceptor/Opel GT/Hot Rod: Derek heads off to Blackpool to pick up a couple of unusual vehicles - a red 1970 Opel GT and a 1956 Ford Hot Rod pickup. S10 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Niagara's Hidden Marvel: Exploring a royal retreat caught in a web of corruption, an engineering marvel hidden behind the Niagara Falls in Canada, and a subterranean treasure. S9 Ep12

UAndYesterday.uk.description: US Ships: The story of America's 'Liberty Ships', which were produced in incredible numbers and became known as the Model T Fords of the ocean. S1 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Kamloops to Calgary: Michael Portillo boards one of the world's most famous trains, the Rocky Mountaineer, to cross the backbone of the North American continent. S4 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Halifax to Prince Edward Island: Michael Portillo begins a new journey on the tracks of the Ocean line to explore Canada's maritime provinces, en route to Quebec City. S4 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Saab 99: Gus and Will seek a Scandinavian car and settle on a Saab. They'd prefer a classic 99, but can only find an older 99 that was bought for a rally but can't go the distance. S2 Ep10

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Rover: Gus and Will set out to buy a Honda-based Rover 800 coupe. At only 650 pounds it seems too good to be true - and when they turn up, they aren't sure whether to proceed. S2 Ep11

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Citroen XM: Gus has his eye on a Citroen XM that looks amazing - but it's in France. Will isn't sure, but the engineering challenges win him over. S2 Ep12

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Audi TT: Gus and Will find an Audi Quattro roadster than has seen better days - it's full of problems, and hasn't been serviced in years. Even so, they are intent on renovating it. S2 Ep13

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Philadelphia to Gettysburg: Michael Portillo travels through Philadelphia, and pays tribute its most famous fictional son, Rocky Balboa. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Wilmington to Fort McHenry: Michael Portillo reaches the boundary between the northern and southern states - the Mason-Dixon line. S1 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Oxford to Reading: Robbie's narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak. S6 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Reading to Windsor: Robbie visits a former Beatle's home in Henley, uncovers horror history in Marlow and struggles to find a mooring in Maidenhead on the River Thames. S6 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Africa: Author and broadcaster Simon Reeve travels around the equator, beginning by visiting African countries including Gabon and Kenya. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Indonesia: Simon Reeve heads to Indonesia, the world's largest archipelagic nation - home to 220 million people speaking 700 different languages on a collection of 18,000 islands. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Latin America: Simon Reeve visits South America, where he learns how the Galapagos Islands are under threat from tourists and meets remote indigenous tribes in Brazil. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Porsche 911: Irv imports an original-run short wheelbase Porsche 911 from the east coast of America. He needs to make it roadworthy, while keeping its incredible sun-faded patina. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Mexico / Riley Kestrel: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the team's most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel. S6 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Datsun 240Z/Rover Mini Cooper: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Fiat X1/9 / Austin A60 Cambridge: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek sells vehicles from TV show Heartbeat, love for an Austin Cambridge, and a sporty Italian number getting rehomed. S3 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Capri 1300L/Honda S800: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction. S3 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Morris Traveller / Subaru Impreza P: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess, and meet a collector who may be willing to part with a huge hot hatch collection. S3 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Ford RS2000/Austin Healey Sprite: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction. S3 Ep9

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Springhill Junction to Quebec City: Michael Portillo continues his journey to Quebec City, during which he investigates the world's biggest tide. S4 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Sainte-Anne-de-Beaupre to Winnipeg: Michael Portillo explores the Province of Quebec, taking the Charlevoix train along the bank of the St Lawrence River to La Malbaie. S4 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Oxford to Reading: Robbie's narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak. S6 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterday.uk.description: New. Paul and Suki head to Wales - where the roads make Paul nervous - as they pitch up at its biggest natural lake and try paddle boarding and synchronised swimming. S2 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterday.uk.description: New. Suki and Paul are in Yorkshire as they stay at the famous Tan Hill Inn, arrange a sheep dog training session, and visit the incredible Ribblehead Viaduct. S2 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterday.uk.description: To the Ends of the Earth: David Attenborough reveals the vast wilderness of the polar regions. At the North Pole, polar bears court and the sun returns after six months of dark. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Spring: Landmark nature series. See warmth and life return to these magical ice worlds as spring arrives in the polar regions and the sun appears after an absence of five months. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Summer: David Attenborough's visually stunning nature series. The sun never sets over summer in the polar regions. See how hordes of animals exploit this brief window of plenty. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Autumn: Witness how solar landscapes change as the big freeze returns. Most animals leave on epic journeys, some battle to breed and for a few it is a time of opportunity. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Winter: During winter most animals abandon the polar regions, but a few extreme survivors remain. This is the story of their battles to endure the planet's harshest winters. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterday.uk.description: The Last Frontier: The penultimate part of David Attenborough's acclaimed nature series. This episode looks at us humans, one of the polar regions' most ingenious inhabitants. S1 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Africa: Author and broadcaster Simon Reeve travels around the equator, beginning by visiting African countries including Gabon and Kenya. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Indonesia: Simon Reeve heads to Indonesia, the world's largest archipelagic nation - home to 220 million people speaking 700 different languages on a collection of 18,000 islands. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Latin America: Simon Reeve visits South America, where he learns how the Galapagos Islands are under threat from tourists and meets remote indigenous tribes in Brazil. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Porsche 911: Irv imports an original-run short wheelbase Porsche 911 from the east coast of America. He needs to make it roadworthy, while keeping its incredible sun-faded patina. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mexico / Riley Kestrel: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the team's most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel. S6 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Datsun 240Z/Rover Mini Cooper: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Fiat X1/9 / Austin A60 Cambridge: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek sells vehicles from TV show Heartbeat, love for an Austin Cambridge, and a sporty Italian number getting rehomed. S3 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Capri 1300L/Honda S800: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction. S3 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Morris Traveller / Subaru Impreza P: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess, and meet a collector who may be willing to part with a huge hot hatch collection. S3 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford RS2000/Austin Healey Sprite: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction. S3 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: New. Suki and Paul are in Yorkshire as they stay at the famous Tan Hill Inn, arrange a sheep dog training session, and visit the incredible Ribblehead Viaduct. S2 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: To the Ends of the Earth: David Attenborough reveals the vast wilderness of the polar regions. At the North Pole, polar bears court and the sun returns after six months of dark. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Spring: Landmark nature series. See warmth and life return to these magical ice worlds as spring arrives in the polar regions and the sun appears after an absence of five months. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Summer: David Attenborough's visually stunning nature series. The sun never sets over summer in the polar regions. See how hordes of animals exploit this brief window of plenty. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Autumn: Witness how solar landscapes change as the big freeze returns. Most animals leave on epic journeys, some battle to breed and for a few it is a time of opportunity. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Winter: During winter most animals abandon the polar regions, but a few extreme survivors remain. This is the story of their battles to endure the planet's harshest winters. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Last Frontier: The penultimate part of David Attenborough's acclaimed nature series. This episode looks at us humans, one of the polar regions' most ingenious inhabitants. S1 Ep6
